title: Verify repo, build, and test baseline
goal: Confirm current repo structure and command baseline before feature work.
implementation_notes: List actual paths before editing.
Run baseline commands and capture actual output.
Do not start feature work in this task.
Add a baseline Vitest smoke test only if the runner has no tests and test command otherwise fails due no tests.
acceptance: No auth/DB/UI feature work is started.
tests: Baseline smoke test only if needed.
stop: Stop if repo files differ materially from handoff or baseline fails for unrelated reasons.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Fix deterministic env defaults and docs mismatch
goal: Make checked-in defaults deterministic-safe.
implementation_notes: Set LLM_ENABLED=false and NEXT_PUBLIC_COPILOT_API_ENABLED=false in examples.
Add placeholders for DATABASE_URL, AUTH_SECRET/SUPABASE env vars only as empty placeholders.
Document that secrets are server-side only.
acceptance: Provider keys are not present or suggested as literal values.
stop: Stop if docs contradict the product contract.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add Vercel-compatible runtime and build config
goal: Remove repo-level build blockers for Vercel Free/Hobby without inventing current Vercel facts.
implementation_notes: Verify current official Vercel docs before hard-coding Node/runtime/function settings.
If docs cannot be checked, mark settings VERIFY_CURRENT_DOCS and continue only non-deployment-dependent local work.
Make Vercel path use standard Next output.
Make static/Codex post-build script conditional.
acceptance: Vercel-specific assumptions are either verified or marked VERIFY_CURRENT_DOCS.
tests: Add config test only if repo already has config tests.
stop: Stop before merging deployment-specific config if current Vercel docs cannot be checked.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add auth provider decision record
goal: Document provider choice before implementation.
implementation_notes: Compare Supabase Auth default with at least one alternative.
State explicit approval flags.
Document no custom password storage if Supabase Auth is used.
stop: Stop before provider SDK install if approval missing.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add persistence provider decision record
goal: Document DB provider before implementation.
implementation_notes: Compare Supabase Postgres default with at least one external managed Postgres alternative.
State metadata-only persistence boundary.
Call out no row/file/report storage.
stop: Stop before provider SDK install if approval missing.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add usage entitlement service interface and test auth abstraction
goal: Make quota logic and authenticated/anonymous route tests possible before provider or DB integration.
implementation_notes: Implement Asia/Bangkok date bucketing.
Expose checkAiEntitlement, reserveAiUsage, recordAiEvent, and markAiEventComplete interfaces.
Start with in-memory adapter.
Add test identity support that cannot be trusted in production.
Do not require Supabase or a real DB.
acceptance: Authenticated/anonymous route tests can use a safe abstraction.
tests: test identity only works in test mode
stop: Stop if date bucketing or test identity would weaken production auth.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Wrap /api/recommend with entitlement and quota check
goal: Gate AI attempts while preserving deterministic fallback.
implementation_notes: Build deterministic fallback first.
Use auth abstraction/test identity before Supabase integration.
If unauthenticated or over quota, return deterministic fallback with reason and do not reserve usage.
Reserve usage atomically only before a provider call attempt.
Record safe event metadata.
acceptance: Provider attempts are counted with reserve.
Missing key does not consume quota.
stop: Stop if fallback shape cannot be preserved.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Wrap /api/copilot with entitlement and quota check
goal: Gate handoff summaries while preserving fallback.
implementation_notes: Apply same pattern as /api/recommend.
Do not consume quota for unauthenticated, over-quota, missing-key, invalid-request, or deterministic-mode fallback before provider call.
Record safe events.
stop: Stop if fallback object lacks reason field.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add usage meter and fallback copy
goal: Show daily AI usage in authenticated app shell or interim shell without breaking demo.
implementation_notes: Add usage endpoint backed by entitlement adapter.
Render used / limit.
Show quota exceeded copy and deterministic-continuation message.
Hide in /demo or render CTA-only.
This is the milestone checkpoint task. After completion, stop and report before provider SDK install, route split, AI coach, or internal dashboard work.
acceptance: Milestone checkpoint report lists changed files, commands run, tests added, product-contract checks, privacy checks, and open approvals.
stop: Stop after T010 for human review before provider SDK install, route split, AI coach, or internal dashboard.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Milestone checkpoint before provider SDKs or large refactors
goal: Prevent one-shot Codex execution from turning into an unsafe giant PR.
implementation_notes: Summarize files changed, commands run, tests added, product-contract checks, privacy checks, and rollback notes.
Confirm explicit approval flags remain true before continuing.
Do not install provider SDKs before this checkpoint passes.
acceptance: Baseline commands are reported with actual output.
Entitlement route tests pass or blockers are documented.
No provider SDKs, route split, AI coach, internal dashboard, or deployment-specific config has started.
tests: No new code tests unless checkpoint detects missing coverage.
stop: Stop before provider SDKs, route split, AI coach, internal dashboard, or deployment-specific config unless checkpoint passes.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Implement Supabase auth integration after explicit approval
goal: Add real auth after T010 checkpoint and approval.
implementation_notes: Proceed only if APPROVED_PROVIDER_IMPLEMENTATION=true and APPROVED_AUTH_PROVIDER=Supabase Auth.
Use Supabase Auth as identity source.
Do not build custom password storage.
Map profile id to auth.users(id).
Protect /app/**; keep /demo public.
Do not proceed unless explicit approval flags remain true.
Do not create an app-owned password table.
acceptance: Login works in dev when env vars are configured.
No provider secrets exposed to browser.
stop: Stop if provider env/credentials are needed or approval flags are not explicit.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Draft metadata-only database schema
goal: Add schema draft for approved tables without running production migrations.
implementation_notes: Create SQL/schema draft for users/user_profiles, ai_usage_daily, ai_events, feedback, custom_templates, and template_versions.
Map app profiles to auth.users if Supabase remains approved.
Document forbidden persistence in schema comments.
tests: Static review if no schema tooling exists.
non_goals: No provider SDK install unless explicitly approved.
stop: Stop before migration execution or if schema requires storing forbidden data.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add Supabase RLS policy draft and server-only DB access rules
goal: Prevent insecure provider integration by defining RLS, auth.users mapping, and service-key boundaries before real DB code.
implementation_notes: Enable RLS on user-owned tables in SQL draft.
Use auth.uid() owner policies.
Make ai_events/ai_usage writes server-controlled.
Document service-role key must never be imported into client modules.
Reviewed templates are read-only to normal users; custom templates are owner-scoped.
acceptance: Server-only DB client boundary is documented.
No client-side service-role key import path exists.
tests: Add policy checks if Supabase local/test tooling exists.
Add static import guard test for service-role key helper if feasible.
non_goals: No direct browser writes unless policies are tested.
stop: Stop before provider integration if RLS ownership rules cannot be defined.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Implement metadata DB adapter after explicit approval
goal: Connect approved Postgres provider safely while preserving metadata-only boundary.
implementation_notes: Proceed only after T006A and explicit approval.
Use server-only DB client for privileged access.
Adapter supports required tables only.
No row persistence method may exist.
acceptance: Tests use memory or test DB.
non_goals: No direct browser writes without RLS tests.
stop: Stop before production DB writes or if server-only key handling is unclear.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Add prompt/model version registry and safe AI event metadata
goal: Track model/prompt metadata without sensitive prompt content.
implementation_notes: Create AI_PROMPT_VERSIONS source of truth.
Every AI task must map to a prompt version.
Events include prompt_version, model, provider, fallback reason, attempted_provider_call, succeeded.
Never store full prompt text.
acceptance: Tests fail if an AI task lacks prompt_version.
No raw request body or full prompt persisted.
stop: Stop if event payload includes user data, full prompts, or row-like values.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.

title: Persist ai_usage_daily and ai_events with atomic reserve
goal: Move usage/event logging from memory to DB adapter using provider-attempt accounting.
implementation_notes: Reserve usage before provider call.
Count provider attempts, not just successes.
Do not increment for unauthenticated, not_entitled, quota_exceeded, ai_disabled, missing_api_key, invalid_request, or request_too_large.
Record attempted_provider_call and succeeded separately.
non_goals: No full prompt or row persistence.
stop: Stop if transaction/reservation semantics are unsafe.
status_note: Historical v1.1 task card. Current state is recorded in qa/final_goal_status.md and qa/supabase_staging_project_check_2026-06-14.md.
